segments.text: Nice to see so many Sahaja Yogis coming here during the Christmas puja.
Christianity has spread all over world and there are
So called Christians who say they follow Christ
I don't know from which angle
Christ was the embodiment of Paramchaitanya, He was Aumkara ,He was Shri Ganesha and those
who follow Him have to be very different people.
But always happens in every religion that they go at random into opposite direction
completely opposite, the essence of Christ life was detachment and sacrifice.
For a person who is detached there's nothing like sacrifice
he sees his live as just drama
such great personality came on this earth
have created so called Christian religion
which has gone into wars, all kinds of hypocritical thing and now the people are discovering about
it. He stood for truth! And fissures don't know what is the truth is? The truth
Is that you're a spirit I have to become this spirit he's
He is the one who has talked about second birth of Realization, but they have forgotten
what he said.
What we are to achieve?
It's such a funny thing that all these great people came on this earth and created
a proper religion for our ascent, and I don't know how people have become so stupid with
the teachings of this So-called their masters.
It's all money oriented apart from that it is not standing on truth.
I think this is the second crucifixion of these religions, there's no religion which
following really their principles as being described.
i don't know how they manage to twist truth in a manner just make some money or
or some fuss. Such a ritualistic stuff is going on in the name of Christ, though they
have faltered so many times and had experience such bad influence over world to reaction
we don't know why? Such round about things come up
And people accept it, they just accept.
You take any religion – these days Islam is talking I don't know of what
there are two important things in the life
Of Mohammed Sahaja. The first one
Is called as mirage
which nothing but awakening of Kundalini absolutely clearly
and second he has talked about Jihad
Jihad means killing your bad things, killing you're bad nature.
Killing all the Shadripus within it doesn't mean that to become a Muslim and kill yourself
is stupid thing today did You became Musalman just
to kill yourself and commit suicide. Calling it as a ritual, they are saying that by this
you will go to Jnana into the heavens – how can You? As Muslims we're not fiddlers
Not at all! And then by killing these sinful people
How will you go to the heavens where we'll have enjoyment of Jnana?
There's no reasoning
But all these Maulanas first off, I've finished their education
Have finish that education they do not educate themselves at all
So there are low idea in this world. Where are they studying what is their position
Some few are educated, but they're also lost with the idea of having power on these people.
It's such a shameful thing to do in God and in the name or spirituality!
Now our duty is tell them what it that truth?
Our duty bring then through proper path of spirituality
because they are all lost. Christians are lost, Muslims are lost, Hindus
Are Lost All of them are lost people They have no idea as to what their religion
professed and What we're supposed do Ultimately Christ was crucified
So you can see how when there was truth untruth tried
to finish it off. They couldn't bear it! We have example of Socrates, what was the need
To kill him? But they killed Him in this way so far we know
In past all people who are pivotal for The truth
Are being finished because
They are following some religion because they can have power over other people, religion
that the have made.
Mirage is a Kundalini awakening and it says that mirages will never take place – very
good!
So many of you I've got realization ,you're got your vibrations and cool breeze which
It is described in Quran that you should feel the cool breeze, but who can tell
Muslims? You talk something they'll come and cut your throat. That's all!
We will go to Jihad. So it such a stupid thing
They are doing
And In these modern times as we see people have crossed
All the Mariyadas
all the things of a religion.
When I went to America,
they were surprised how
They have forgotten about morality
–they had no sense of morality
and there was selling it in market
making money out off
On contrary these Muslims
specially their is class called Wahhabis
These people are saying
that women are the one who spoil your morality and so hide them, they should be covered.
Any woman was wearing white chappals in Afghanistan
They were beating her, killed him
And many people of India especially North have taken to Islamic culture
and they really ill-treat women in the north. I was married to a man from the North
And i know how
They have been unkind
So, north of India is already contaminated by this
At the south it's
Contaminated
By The fanatic Hindus all kinds of rituals
worst type
Disturbed upon only on Women are followed In the South
They will shave the head of a woman, make her go round
in temple pour water on Her and She is just tumbling around.
she's not walking but they're going putting water
I've seen it man we have Sati
Is off the killing of women after death their husband
This something no one can understand
Why I put all the dharma on women, why not on men.
But one thing good that Hindu religion has now become so much out of date
That you can correct all these things
So many have been corrected in my own life time
And was surprised how could they do it
But in Muslims and Islam, you cannot correct such horrible things they do to their women.
And whenever You try it – To help them is impossible!
For example I started a place for the woman who are left out of world alone
Who like orphans
Have children
I was surprised, most of them are Muslims and they have eight to ten children each.
So now we've got make an orphanage also this is what their producing out there religion
you can see these around even Hindus has a funny system of widowhood if the made
woman widows it's terrible and that poor things some other or quite lot of them
or living in Vrindavan, I was told that they get one rupee per day and what do
They sing bhajans. In 1 rupee how can we live with this country?
There are good at creating so many beggars
and beggar women if is the religion better not have it
We've had enough of all kinds
of ritualism through this Brahman-ism, these Brahmins are absolutely good for nothing.
Those who try to teach religion have something of a great level so in Sahaja Yoga you give
up everything because it is all nothing but mud and the mud will be finished.
You have to tell people about it, what are they going
do? They had misused the religion for all
kinds of bad things. Like in England if somebody
dies then must have champagne when
go up from a barrier there must be champagne
How is that they will have champagne for this and how
out of religion you say all their priests also drink
One priest came to Sahaja Yoga, I was very happy but he said
''I'll come for sahaj but i will not give up drinking''
I said why? Because it's written in the bible that you must drink asha.
How could Christ say
That we should drink
He wasn't only a realiser himself
But HE was realization Himself
They said He has said it
Whatever you may say, he has said it.
Where? He went to one wedding
in that wedding
and made wine for the people
but they did not
.He went there
And such a short time
,he just put his hand
In water
It started tasting
like grape juice
Grape juice is the same word wine
Hebrew language. I said,
''I can do that.'' That doesn't mean
i like people to drink.
I mean who can say
such a nonsense? It is
awareness which
important. Chetana
it's important and
if you spoil your
awareness how
can be so juicy?
It was impossible
tell them that you cannot
but drinking even in India
has become very common. It is all against Christianity, it's
against Hinduism and against Islam
And though its written down in Koran don't drink they take
They all drink instead of following the religion
there becomes a greatest sinner
Is that what Christ wanted them to do?
You have be pure people
Nirmala Tattvam you must have
That's what it is. Also, I told you a story about Shadi Vahana who met
Christ in Kashmir and he asked Christ
About his name
And His country he says I come from the country where people are malich
Malich means those have desire for
Mala
For filth so He told him
Why don't you go and teach them Nirmala Tattvam, Shalivanasana?
That is what nirmala tattvams You have got which purifies You.
Which cleanses Your Self ,which gives You joy happiness
And the truth
This Is What we should ask for
Otherwise it's all darkness
We dont see The light
Whether your Christian Hindu Muslim anyone
Now you cannot see light of truth and you have to take the Light Of Truth.
But after that what do we want?
You had give it others, you have transform other's your work very hard for it
And sometimes I am surprised how people who are doing such a good work
Are so humble and so good. How have they achieved it? I can't address of course
There are some who our money oriented
Who are power-oriented
But these things do not give joy
What gives Joy is your
inner
light
Of truth which you have all of us as we know
We, All Have experienced
But I would say, this experience has to be given
others. It's not only for you
even as many people possible
but how may do that? How many
peopledo that we have also sick community
they came to Sahaja Yoga
They said We cannot worship Goddess
I said why? Surprised at it
because Shri Guru Nanak
has talked about the Goddess,
The Devi.
First sentence of His book is Adyaya
Adya is the Adishakti
and for this if the Sikhs stupidly say
that why do they have a Chandigarh
They are so stupid also
nothing to really compare
Now you've got understand
Have given up all those nonsense or not in your life
Or are you all sticking on to the same?
That is very important.
As long as, You're sticking onto The Same there will be a problem.
Sahaja Yoga does so much I was surprised in America
There were 300 sahajogis nothing happened to them
Somewhere around the tower somewhere round the street
All of then where they and nothing has happened
Some of them said that somebody told us inside, told us inside the trunaway and we started
running in other direction somewhere delayed. I don't know how all these three hundreds
such a devil of this people who are thinking about destroying whole world or coming around
This is reason why went to America And i had tell then it will be over before
Before Diwali this war would be over and it ended.
What a stupid thing to think they can destroy the creation of God like that?
Who are They, how have got The right To destroy
the world but that is what is a human nonsense Christ came on this earth he worked for a
long time and He was to be crucified so He got crucified. But crucifixion
Is not our glory, Our Glory
Is His resurrection
That He was resurrected
No doubt
To say
it's not possible and all that. Who are you to say? What do You know about spirituality,
what can happen with a person who is spiritually equipped – whatever we
We know about human beings, we try to draw conclusions which are all wrong.
See in your life there so many miracles of the lives of Sahaja Yogis and I told somebody
that you better compile them."
So he said within one month those letters have come upto my head –in 1month!
I said forget it, don't write.
It's not one or two from all over the world people are writing
but those who're intellectuals
is very difficult
Is impossible to put this into their heads
so whatever possible we have do our maximum
Put your attention on what you want
Now in India
It has gone to jails, it had gone into schools and everywhere.
And somebody told Me the other day that even in a Catholic church they have started taking
to Sahaja Yoga – I don't know what's wrong with their heads
or how they've managed but that is how Sahaja Yoga is spreading
but it has to spread much more. You have, all of you individually should go round and
work out about it – talk a lot! But Sahaja Yogis are little shy… Once I was going
by plane one lady who is very-very hot so asked her what guru she follows? She told
Me the name….I was surprised that she didn't know anything about spirituality
And these people have huge houses and big temples, everything.
I'm sure they'll talk about it but the other day
had gone with somebody in a market
an'I had a sahaja yogi with him
& was surprised he started telling them
About Me
An'he started giving them realization
and They were very happy about it
Everywhere you go you've neighbours who goes to markets
Everywhere you should go and talk about it, like they sing carols.
We also have bhajans to tell other people we are so shy – this shyness is not going
help Sahaja Yoga.
So please see that if try give realizations for others then I think they lack in faith
or whatever it is, there are very few people who come out and do.
Italy I have seen also Austria, Australia, Sahaja Yoga has spread a lot because of their
conviction that we had to give others what they have – you've got share from the
In the life of Christ one has to understand his sacrifice, it's such a lot of sacrifices
To be crucified like that with thieves but he did in.
The same way when you all people want to do Sahaja Yoga work
You shouldn't think what will happen
to my grandfather, what will happen
To My grandmother.
I mean whatever letters i get all about this
It's very funny
They are only worried
About some relations
they're not worried
about the relationships
All over world you have
Worried
About wife or children
And gets only letters like these
Nobody writes
That we've given realizations
So many
They never write how they have been able to achieve spreading of Sahaja Yoga.
No one writes, very surprising!
You've got tell me I hope you all people understand the importance or spreading Sahajyoga
if don't do that your absolutely useless
The greatest thing for Me, as you have so many lights here we should
have many more Sahaja Yogis all over the world.
If You want to change this world and if You
Want To avoid All these trials
And tribulations of useless life they are leading
You have to save them, you've got to salvage that's your job.
That is what we are paying for Sahaja Yoga not for yourself
Not For Yourself
Don't get worried about yourself
If read the letters I will get disgusted
Letters i'll Get
They want to marry
There many girls who claim
that we have been applying for four years,
We couldn't get married.
First you must know
out of proportion women are there
they're very good
so if their 40 boys
There would be at least 120 or maybe even 150 girls
So now who should marry those girls?
Just think off it
but the write letters of complaint
That we've applied 4 times
We can't, we cant help it.
So you go outside marry anywhere that feel like or else wait and see and dedicate your
life to Sahaja Yoga its a very difficult thing when they go on complaining I should
be married but haven got married as well.
Marriage was never our idea then had allow marriages now has become the main issue
with everyone. Either they are not married, if they're married
They' renot happy ,if there divorce
There must be married again . All sorts of things
Complications for which I'm Not prepared
Sahaja Yoga is NOT for that
If your marriage Is not successful It's not my job
And it goes on we'll have to stop marriages
I don't want you to write all these things to Me, which shows how poor You are in Sahaja Yoga.
Why not try it with me? How many people have given realization that would make Me happy
instead of complaining about Your wife and other sort my concern as It came We have married You
If you cannot carry on, it's sure to die and this is what
Is the snack of Sahaja Yoga.
In every religious movement there have been so many wrong things
While in sahaj yoga I think marriage is a very big hurdle
Moreover boys don't come because
in India very easy to marry boys, you can also get money this that. But girls there are five
times more than the boy's. Boys don't want marriage they have their own marriages though
They're sahaja yogis so I cant understand why is sahajog after coming into realization
To them marriage a very important issue what it most important is how many people
That is your life, if a lotus there it will open but it must give fragrance even the lotus
has responsibility.
Then what about you people?
I am not saying that you get crucified like Christ no!
I said, you enjoy your life.
You have peace and stability balance but at the same time
–you've to spread Sahaja Yoga– this is what
Is Your job now!
Your Job isn't important only This
Is important how many people
You give realization
It's very-very difficult because they
They have made a mess of all the great incarnations,
All those great Sufis and saints.
But at least you people don't do that
so please try to think whom can give Realization
To Whom You Can Talk About Sahaja Yoga
We've got spread out
And next time I hope
i hear from you
how many peopel you gave Realization
That is greatest justification
For the crucifixion of Christ, for His birth ,for His coming on this earth is Agnya.
And if you have given Realization they've crossed Agnya
They're gone beyond and there are in Sahastrara
So In Sahaja Yoga You understand everything
It's very easy to understand
Sahajyoga Is a simplest thing
To Understand but after realization
So, you have to go round and see how many people can give Realization.
Everything is alright – all your worshipping's are right , your puja'a is alright . What
most important thing?
How may be the number of people who has given Realization ? I would like know that
how many people are given, especially with ladies.
Ladies rather weak in giving realization
they can do a lot I know that after all
but somehow find the ladies
in sahaja yoga are not of level
They cant do a lot and lot
But some how don't understand the importance of their life
You know, very important how many people there are who have got Realization.
There were so many Sufis
Who've Got Realization they write poetry finished
They're also saints
Who did much wrote some things
In India we had a lot of saints
They wrote all these thing and the people will read them
But nothing happens
You have, you've got the art of giving realization.
If don't know about Kundalini
if do not all about it go ahead and talk to people
I was alone when i started Sahaja Yoga
And am a woman
So what about you?
That's now challenge for all of us
How many peoples are we made Sahaja Yogis
Even in your family people arenot Sahajyogis
your daughter is not, your son is not. So what's the use of singing glory to Christ?
If you are singing glory to Him You must make people cross their archaic. He so highly
placed within us but we have never respected him that such a highly-placed personality
personality you have crossed over. So why not others? Let us see from today's puja
how much determination we should know that a goddess doesn't come with your own demands
she comes on her own, She has Her Own timing but if You are people in majority who really
become saints and making others saintly, then I am for you.
Otherwise i'm available to You –
You can have my vibrations
,You Can Have My Poojas
all these things are permitted no doubt
but For that
Your only capable
your Only Entirely for That
if You're doing Sahaja Yoga
If You Are spreading Sahaj yoga
If you are giving to others, then only
You will be considered really
capable of receiving the vibrations from The Goddess.
In some countries if it is so much called
why not with your country
With Your neighborhood
With your friends
Which your relations is possible
So today we have decided
that you are going to dedicate yourself in giving it others.
It's very joy-giving and talking about Sahaja Yoga, may God bless you!
